findings.title: Installed on-the-fly via a package runner
findings.detail: Server 'mcp-remote-untrusted' is fetched and executed at launch via 'npx' with auto-accept flag(s) -y; package spec: mcp-remote-EXAMPLE-do-not-install.
findings.recommendation: Install the server as a pinned dependency and invoke the local binary, or vendor it. If a runner is unavoidable, pin an exact version (see unpinned_source).

findings.recommendation: Pin an exact version (pkg@1.2.3) or a git commit SHA. Avoid @latest and branch refs.

findings.title: Remote server over a non-HTTPS transport
findings.detail: Server 'mcp-remote-untrusted' targets a cleartext 'http://' URL passed as a command argument (non-localhost host).
findings.recommendation: Use https:// (or wss://). If this is a local dev server on localhost, confirm it is never reachable off-host.
